title: Test onCreate method initializes components correctly
test_steps: ["Launch the RegistrationActivity", "Verify that all EditText fields (etFullName, etEmailRegister, etPasswordRegister, etCarBrand, etCo2Emission, etFuelType) are initialized", "Verify that the btnRegister button is initialized", "Verify that the tvLoginLink TextView is initialized"]
expected_result: ["All EditText fields are not null", "btnRegister is not null", "tvLoginLink is not null"]

title: Test setSpan method makes 'Hai già un account? Loggati' clickable
test_steps: ["Launch the RegistrationActivity", "Click on the tvLoginLink TextView", "Verify that it navigates to LoginActivity"]

title: Test registerUser method with empty fields
test_steps: ["Launch the RegistrationActivity", "Leave all fields empty", "Click on the btnRegister button", "Verify that a toast message 'Compila tutti i campi' is displayed"]
expected_result: ["Toast message 'Compila tutti i campi' is displayed"]

title: Test registerUser method with invalid email
test_steps: ["Launch the RegistrationActivity", "Enter an invalid email address", "Click on the btnRegister button", "Verify that a toast message 'Inserisci un'email valida' is displayed"]

title: Test registerUser method with successful registration
test_steps: ["Launch the RegistrationActivity", "Fill all fields with valid data", "Click on the btnRegister button", "Verify that a toast message 'Registrazione completata' is displayed", "Verify that the app navigates to LoginActivity"]
expected_result: ["Toast message 'Registrazione completata' is displayed", "Navigates to LoginActivity"]
